title: Rosa and the Lonely Butterfly
synopsis: When Rosa finds a sad butterfly alone in her garden, she feels worried and wants to help. Through kindness and patience, Rosa helps the butterfly find friends and discovers the joy of making new friendships herself.

pages.text: Rosa loved playing in her garden. She had curly black hair and wore her favorite yellow dress with sunflowers on it. Today, Rosa felt happy as she walked among the bright flowers.

illustration.description: A cheerful young Latina girl with curly black hair wearing a sunny yellow dress decorated with sunflower prints. She's walking through a colorful garden filled with red roses, purple petunias, and orange marigolds. Her face shows pure joy with a wide smile. The illustration has a bright cartoon style with rounded shapes and bold primary colors against a textured paper background.
illustration.alt: Rosa, a happy young girl with curly hair, walking through a colorful flower garden

pages.text: Near the rose bushes, Rosa saw a small orange butterfly sitting alone on a leaf. The butterfly looked very sad. Its beautiful wings were drooping down, and Rosa felt worried about the little creature.

illustration.description: A small orange and black butterfly with drooping wings perched sadly on a green leaf near pink rose bushes. Rosa stands nearby with a concerned expression, her hand gently reaching toward the butterfly. The butterfly's posture shows sadness with downturned wing edges. The scene uses warm colors with textured backgrounds resembling construction paper.
illustration.alt: A sad orange butterfly on a leaf while Rosa looks on with concern

pages.text: "Hello, little butterfly," Rosa said softly. "Why do you look so sad?" The butterfly lifted its head slowly. "I'm scared," it whispered. "I can't find any other butterflies to play with. I feel so lonely."

illustration.description: Rosa kneeling down at eye level with the orange butterfly, both characters facing each other in conversation. Rosa's expression shows empathy and kindness, while the butterfly looks up with teary eyes. Soft morning light filters through the garden, creating gentle shadows on the textured ground that resembles colored paper.
illustration.alt: Rosa talking gently to the sad butterfly in the garden

pages.text: Rosa felt sad for her new friend. She wanted to help! "Don't be scared," Rosa said kindly. "Let's look for other butterflies together. I'll help you find friends." The butterfly felt a little braver with Rosa's help.

illustration.description: Rosa extending her finger as a perch for the orange butterfly, both looking determined and hopeful. Rosa's expression shows determination and kindness, while the butterfly appears more confident with slightly lifted wings. They're positioned as a team, ready to explore together. The garden background shows various colorful flowers in bold, cheerful cartoon style.
illustration.alt: Rosa offering help to the butterfly as they prepare to search together

pages.text: They searched behind the sunflowers and near the fountain. Soon, Rosa spotted yellow and blue butterflies dancing around the lavender plants! "Look!" Rosa said excitedly. The orange butterfly felt happy and flew over to join them.

illustration.description: A joyful scene showing Rosa pointing excitedly toward three butterflies - one yellow, one blue, and the orange butterfly - all fluttering around purple lavender plants near a small garden fountain. Rosa's face beams with excitement and accomplishment. The butterflies appear to be welcoming the orange butterfly into their group. Bright, cheerful colors dominate the scene.
illustration.alt: Rosa discovering other butterflies playing together near lavender plants

pages.text: Now the orange butterfly had friends to play with! All the butterflies danced together in the sunshine. Rosa felt so happy watching them. "Thank you, Rosa," called the orange butterfly. "You helped me feel brave and find friends!"

illustration.description: A heartwarming final scene showing Rosa clapping her hands with joy as four colorful butterflies - orange, yellow, blue, and a new purple one - dance together in the air above the garden. Rosa's face shows pure happiness and satisfaction. The butterflies create a circular dance pattern, showing their friendship. Golden sunlight bathes the entire garden scene with warm, cheerful tones.
illustration.alt: Rosa watching happily as the butterflies play together as friends

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: How did the butterfly feel at the beginning of the story?
questions.explanation: The butterfly felt sad and scared because it was lonely and couldn't find other butterflies to play with.

questions.question: What did Rosa want to do when she saw the sad butterfly?
questions.explanation: Rosa felt worried about the butterfly and wanted to help it find friends.

questions.question: Where did Rosa and the butterfly find the other butterflies?
questions.explanation: Rosa spotted the yellow and blue butterflies dancing around the lavender plants.

questions.question: How did everyone feel at the end of the story?
questions.explanation: Rosa felt happy watching the butterflies play together, and the butterfly was happy to have found friends.

pages.title: Fill in the Missing Words - Page 1
pages.text: Rosa loved playing in her ____. The butterfly looked very ____. Rosa felt ____ about the little creature.

pages.title: Fill in the Missing Words - Page 2
pages.text: Rosa wanted to ____! The butterfly felt a little ____ with Rosa's help. Now the orange butterfly had ____ to play with!
